Container.Name: twitch-miner-manager
Container.Overview: Web-managed multi-account Twitch Channel Points miner with per-account proxy support. One container hosts a web UI (dashboard, accounts, proxies, live logs) and runs one miner process per account. Watch-only: points, streaks, drops and moments — no predictions/bets.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web interface. Change the LEFT (host) value to whatever you like — the WebUI link follows it automatically. Only touch WEB_PORT (advanced) if you also change the container-internal port.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Database, cookies, logs and secret key

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Optional Fernet key for credential encryption. Leave empty to auto-generate into /data.

Config.Name: WEB_PORT
Config.Description: Container-internal port uvicorn binds to. Leave at 8000 for normal use (change only the WebUI Port host mapping above). If you set this to another value, set the WebUI Port container/target port to the SAME value.

Config.Name: PROXY_ALLOW_DIRECT
Config.Description: If a running account's proxy dies and no working proxy is free, keep mining WITHOUT a proxy as a last resort (re-attaches a proxy once one works again).

Config.Name: PROXY_CHECK_INTERVAL
Config.Description: Seconds between proxy health checks of running accounts.

Config.Name: AUTOSTART_ENABLED
Config.Description: Automatically (re)start enabled accounts when the container boots, once their proxies are reachable.

Config.Name: AUTOSTART_MAX_WAIT
Config.Description: Max seconds to wait for proxies/tunnel to become reachable before auto-starting anyway.

Config.Name: MULLVAD_WG_CONF
Config.Description: Optional: paste a full Mullvad WireGuard config to enable the built-in tunnel (needed for Mullvad SOCKS5 relays). Alternatively drop the file at /data/mullvad.conf. Split-tunnel by default (WebUI stays on LAN). Requires the NET_ADMIN cap + /dev/net/tun (already in Extra Parameters).

Config.Name: MULLVAD_FULL_TUNNEL
Config.Description: Route ALL container traffic through Mullvad instead of only the Mullvad subnets. Leave false so the WebUI stays reachable on your LAN.
